description_long: This object is a spiny crab with a roughly triangular, spiked carapace and long, slender legs. Its body is covered in small nodules and spines, giving it a rough, armored appearance. The crab has one large, prominent claw and a smaller, less pronounced claw, both attached to elongated arms. The legs are jointed and appear thin, with some showing a slight curve and tapering to pointed tips. The coloration is a mix of pale pink, reddish-brown, and off-white, with subtle variations across the body and limbs. The crab's eyes are not clearly visible, and no antennae are apparent in the images.
description: A spiny, triangular-bodied crab with long, thin legs and one large claw, colored in pinkish and reddish-brown hues.
description_view_0: The crab is seen from a front-left angle, highlighting the large claw raised above the body and the spiny, textured carapace.
description_view_1: A left-side view shows the elongated arm with the large claw extended forward and the arrangement of the legs.
description_view_2: A rear view displays the triangular shape of the carapace and the symmetrical spread of the legs.
description_view_3: The right-side view emphasizes the crab's spiny back and the smaller claw, with the large claw partially visible.
